    Description
    private void
    ProcessModel.addProducedStreamReference(String areaName, StreamInterface stream, JsonProcessExporter exporter, IdentityHashMap<StreamInterface,ProcessModel.AreaStreamReference> producedStreamReferences)
    Adds one locally produced stream reference to the identity map.
    private void
    ProcessModel.collectProducedStreamReferences(String areaName, ProcessSystem process, JsonProcessExporter exporter, IdentityHashMap<StreamInterface,ProcessModel.AreaStreamReference> producedStreamReferences)
    Collects stream references that are locally produced by one process area.

    ProcessModel.exportInterAreaLinks(IdentityHashMap<StreamInterface,ProcessModel.AreaStreamReference> producedStreamReferences)
